'''âr-ng-sh''' ('''karangash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nasalize|nasalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nasalize|nasalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-ng-sh
|-
! Lemma
| karangash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirangash|thirangash]] || [[word:jirangash|jirangash]] || [[word:shirangash|shirangash]] || [[word:kirangash|kirangash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurangash|thuthurangash]] || [[word:jujurangash|jujurangash]] || [[word:shushurangash|shushurangash]] || [[word:kukurangash|kukurangash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurangash|thurangash]] || [[word:jurangash|jurangash]] || [[word:shurangash|shurangash]] || [[word:kurangash|kurangash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurangash|thurangash]] || [[word:jurangash|jurangash]] || [[word:shurangash|shurangash]] || [[word:kurangash|kurangash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therangash|therangash]] || [[word:jerangash|jerangash]] || [[word:sherangash|sherangash]] || [[word:kerangash|kerangash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorangash|thothorangash]] || [[word:jojorangash|jojorangash]] || [[word:shoshorangash|shoshorangash]] || [[word:kokorangash|kokorangash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorangash|thorangash]] || [[word:jorangash|jorangash]] || [[word:shorangash|shorangash]] || [[word:korangash|korangash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorangash|thorangash]] || [[word:jorangash|jorangash]] || [[word:shorangash|shorangash]] || [[word:korangash|korangash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrangash|thĂŠrangash]] || [[word:jĂŠrangash|jĂŠrangash]] || [[word:shĂŠrangash|shĂŠrangash]] || [[word:kĂŠrangash|kĂŠrangash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharangash|thatharangash]] || [[word:jajarangash|jajarangash]] || [[word:shasharangash|shasharangash]] || [[word:kakarangash|kakarangash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharangash|tharangash]] || [[word:jarangash|jarangash]] || [[word:sharangash|sharangash]] || [[word:karangash|karangash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharangash|tharangash]] || [[word:jarangash|jarangash]] || [[word:sharangash|sharangash]] || [[word:karangash|karangash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharangash|sharangash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharangash|gosharangash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharangash|gokisharangash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharangashnĂŒ|sharangashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharangashnknĂŒ|gosharangashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangashnĂŒ|gokisharangashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharangashĂ«|sharangashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharangashnkshĂ«|gosharangashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharangashĂ«|gokisharangashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangashro|sharangashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangashnkro|gosharangashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangashro|gokisharangashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangashmu|sharangashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangashnkmu|gosharangashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangashmu|gokisharangashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharangasher|sharangasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharangashnksher|gosharangashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharangasher|gokisharangasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharangashng|sharangashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharangashnkng|gosharangashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharangashng|gokisharangashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharangashya|sharangashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharangashnkya|gosharangashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharangashya|gokisharangashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharangashyam|sharangashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharangashnkyam|gosharangashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharangashyam|gokisharangashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangashnĂŒshĂ«|sharangashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangashnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharangashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangashnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharangashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangashnĂŒro|sharangashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangashnknĂŒro|gosharangashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangashnĂŒro|gokisharangashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangashnĂŒmu|sharangashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangashnknĂŒmu|gosharangashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangashnĂŒmu|gokisharangashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangashĂ«nĂŒ|sharangashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharangashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangashĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharangashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangashĂ«ro|sharangashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangashnkshĂ«ro|gosharangashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangashĂ«ro|gokisharangashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangashĂ«mu|sharangashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangashnkshĂ«mu|gosharangashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangashĂ«mu|gokisharangashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangashronĂŒ|sharangashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangashnkronĂŒ|gosharangashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangashronĂŒ|gokisharangashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangashroshĂ«|sharangashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangashnkroshĂ«|gosharangashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangashroshĂ«|gokisharangashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangashromu|sharangashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangashnkromu|gosharangashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangashromu|gokisharangashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangashmunĂŒ|sharangashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangashnkmunĂŒ|gosharangashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangashmunĂŒ|gokisharangashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangashmushĂ«|sharangashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangashnkmushĂ«|gosharangashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangashmushĂ«|gokisharangashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangashmuro|sharangashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangashnkmuro|gosharangashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangashmuro|gokisharangashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
